actionUnits.condition: EventTrigger (MonoBehaviour id: 964435068, Script guid: d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) has eventID 4 (PointerClick) with a persistent call to Government.showlabel on MonoBehaviour id: 964435066 (guid: ed3b45ff7bbab2146bc55b624801e08e). EventTrigger (MonoBehaviour id: 964435068, Script guid: d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) has eventID 4 (PointerClick) with a persistent call to Government.showlabel on MonoBehaviour id: 964435066 (guid: ed3b45ff7bbab2146bc55b624801e08e). Government.Start caches Player.transform.GetChild(1) as label. Expected result: Player child[1] TextMeshPro text becomes first 20 chars of 'Government:Town Hall' (exactly 'Government:Town Hall').
